+type Expr = Num(Float) | Add(Expr, Expr) | Sub(Expr, Expr) | Mul(Expr, Expr) | Div(Expr, Expr)

+fn parse_expr (input:String)->Result<Expr> [fail]
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len>0 ~err_empty_input
  +if contains(trimmed, "+")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "-")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "*")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "/")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +else
    +let num:Int = to_int(trimmed)
    +let float_val:Float = num
    +return Num(float_val)

+fn eval_calc (expr:Expr)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +match expr
  +case Num(val)
    +return val
  +case Add(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l + r
  +case Sub(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l - r
  +case Mul(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l * r
  +case Div(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +check not_zero r != 0.0 ~err_division_by_zero
    +return l / r

+fn calculator ()->String [io,async]
  +await dummy1:String = println("=== Simple Calculator ===")
  +await dummy2:String = println("Enter expressions like: 5+3, 10*2, 8/2")
  +await dummy3:String = println("Type 'quit' to exit")
  +await dummy4:String = println("")
  +let running:Bool = true
  +while running
    +await input:String = read_line("> ")
    +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
    +if trimmed == "quit"
      +set running = false
      +await bye:String = println("Goodbye!")
    +else
      +call result:Result<Expr> = parse_expr(trimmed)
      +if result.is_ok
        +let expr:Expr = result.unwrap
        +call eval_result:Result<Float> = eval_calc(expr)
        +if eval_result.is_ok
          +let answer:Float = eval_result.unwrap
          +let answer_str:String = to_string(answer)
          +let msg:String = concat("= ", answer_str)
          +await show:String = println(msg)
        +else
          +await err:String = println("Error: division by zero")
      +else
        +await err:String = println("Error: invalid expression")
  +return "done"

!eval calculator

+fn sha256_ch (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bit_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bit_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bit_and(not_x, z)
  +return bit_xor(xy, not_xz)

+fn sha256_maj (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bit_and(x, y)
  +let xz:Int = bit_and(x, z)
  +let yz:Int = bit_and(y, z)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(xy, xz)
  +return bit_xor(t, yz)

+fn sha256_sigma0 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r2:Int = left_rotate(x, 30)
  +let r13:Int = left_rotate(x, 19)
  +let r22:Int = left_rotate(x, 10)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r2, r13)
  +return bit_xor(t, r22)

+fn sha256_sigma1 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r6:Int = left_rotate(x, 26)
  +let r11:Int = left_rotate(x, 21)
  +let r25:Int = left_rotate(x, 7)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r6, r11)
  +return bit_xor(t, r25)

+fn sha256_sigma_lower0 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r7:Int = left_rotate(x, 25)

  +let msg_len:Int = msg.len
  +let bit_len:Int = msg_len * 8
  +let padded:List<String> = list()

  +set padded = push(padded, from_char_code(128))
  +let current_len:Int = msg_len + 1
  +let target:Int = 56
  +while current_len % 64 != target
    +set padded = push(padded, from_char_code(0))
    +set current_len = current_len + 1
  +let len_bytes:List<String> = list()
  +let remaining:Int = bit_len
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 8
    +let byte_val:Int = shr(remaining, (7 - i) * 8)

+fn draw_duck ()->String [io,async]
  +let cmd:String = concat("convert -size 400x400 xc:skyblue ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,250 80,100 0,360\" ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,150 60,80 0,360\" ", concat("-fill orange -draw \"polygon 140,140 120,150 140,160\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 180,130 180,135\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 220,130 220,135\" ", "duck.png"))))))
  +await result:String = shell_exec(cmd)
  +return concat("Duck drawn! Result: ", result)

!eval draw_duck

+type Expr = Num(Float) | Add(Expr, Expr) | Sub(Expr, Expr) | Mul(Expr, Expr) | Div(Expr, Expr)

+fn parse_expr (input:String)->Result<Expr> [fail]
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len>0 ~err_empty_input
  +if contains(trimmed, "+")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "-")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "*")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "/")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +else
    +let num:Int = to_int(trimmed)
    +let float_val:Float = num
    +return Num(float_val)

+fn eval_calc (expr:Expr)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +match expr
  +case Num(val)
    +return val
  +case Add(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l + r
  +case Sub(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l - r
  +case Mul(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l * r
  +case Div(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +check not_zero r != 0.0 ~err_division_by_zero
    +return l / r

+fn calculator ()->String [io,async]
  +await dummy1:String = println("=== Simple Calculator ===")
  +await dummy2:String = println("Enter expressions like: 5+3, 10*2, 8/2")
  +await dummy3:String = println("Type 'quit' to exit")
  +await dummy4:String = println("")
  +let running:Bool = true
  +while running
    +await input:String = read_line("> ")
    +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
    +if trimmed == "quit"
      +set running = false
      +await bye:String = println("Goodbye!")
    +else
      +call result:Result<Expr> = parse_expr(trimmed)
      +if result.is_ok
        +let expr:Expr = result.unwrap
        +call eval_result:Result<Float> = eval_calc(expr)
        +if eval_result.is_ok
          +let answer:Float = eval_result.unwrap
          +let answer_str:String = to_string(answer)
          +let msg:String = concat("= ", answer_str)
          +await show:String = println(msg)
        +else
          +await err:String = println("Error: division by zero")
      +else
        +await err:String = println("Error: invalid expression")
  +return "done"

!eval calculator

+fn calc (input:String)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +call expr:Expr = parse_expr(input)
  +call result:Float = eval_calc(expr)
  +return result

!test calc
  +with "5+3" -> expect Ok
  +with "10*2" -> expect Ok
  +with "8/2" -> expect Ok
  +with "10-3" -> expect Ok

!eval calc "5+3"

!replace parse_expr
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len > 0 ~err_empty_input
  +if starts_with(trimmed, "(")
    +let closing:Int = index_of(trimmed, ")")
    +check has_closing closing >= 0 ~err_unmatched_paren
    +let inner:String = substring(trimmed, 1, closing)
    +call inner_expr:Expr = parse_expr(inner)
    +let rest:String = substring(trimmed, closing + 1, trimmed.len)
    +if rest.len == 0
      +return inner_expr
    +let rest_trimmed:String = trim(rest)
    +let first_char:String = char_at(rest_trimmed, 0)
    +if first_char == "+"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Add(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "-"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Sub(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "*"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Mul(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "/"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Div(inner_expr, right)
    +else
      +check valid_continuation false ~err_invalid_after_paren
      +return inner_expr
  +let plus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
  +let minus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
  +let mul_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
  +let div_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
  +if plus_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, plus_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, plus_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +if minus_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, minus_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, minus_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +if mul_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, mul_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, mul_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +if div_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, div_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, div_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +call num:Float = to_float(trimmed)
  +return Num(num)

!test calc

  +with "((2+3)*4)" -> expect Ok(20.0)

+fn sha256_ch (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bit_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bit_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bit_and(not_x, z)
  +return bit_xor(xy, not_xz)

+fn sha256_maj (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bit_and(x, y)
  +let xz:Int = bit_and(x, z)
  +let yz:Int = bit_and(y, z)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(xy, xz)
  +return bit_xor(t, yz)

+fn sha256_sigma0 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r2:Int = left_rotate(x, 30)
  +let r13:Int = left_rotate(x, 19)
  +let r22:Int = left_rotate(x, 10)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r2, r13)
  +return bit_xor(t, r22)

+fn sha256_sigma1 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r6:Int = left_rotate(x, 26)
  +let r11:Int = left_rotate(x, 21)
  +let r25:Int = left_rotate(x, 7)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r6, r11)
  +return bit_xor(t, r25)

+fn sha256_sigma_lower0 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r7:Int = left_rotate(x, 25)
  +let r18:Int = left_rotate(x, 14)
  +let s3:Int = shr(x, 3)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r7, r18)
  +return bit_xor(t, s3)

+fn sha256_sigma_lower1 (x:Int)->Int
  +let r17:Int = left_rotate(x, 15)
  +let r19:Int = left_rotate(x, 13)
  +let s10:Int = shr(x, 10)
  +let t:Int = bit_xor(r17, r19)
  +return bit_xor(t, s10)

+fn sha256_pad (msg:String)->List<Int>
  +let msg_len:Int = msg.len
  +let bit_len:Int = msg_len * 8
  +let padded:List<String> = list()
  +set padded = push(padded, msg)
  +set padded = push(padded, from_char_code(128))
  +let current_len:Int = msg_len + 1
  +let target:Int = 56
  +while current_len % 64 != target
    +set padded = push(padded, from_char_code(0))
    +set current_len = current_len + 1
  +let len_bytes:List<String> = list()
  +let remaining:Int = bit_len
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 8
    +let byte_val:Int = shr(remaining, (7 - i) * 8)
    +let byte_wrapped:Int = bit_and(byte_val, 255)
    +set len_bytes = push(len_bytes, from_char_code(byte_wrapped))
    +set i = i + 1
  +each len_bytes b:String
    +set padded = push(padded, b)
  +return padded

+fn bytes_to_words (bytes:List<String>)->List<Int>
  +let words:List<Int> = list()
  +let i:Int = 0
  +let num_bytes:Int = bytes.len
  +while i < num_bytes
    +let b0:String = get(bytes, i)
    +let b1:String = get(bytes, i + 1)
    +let b2:String = get(bytes, i + 2)
    +let b3:String = get(bytes, i + 3)
    +let w:Int = char_code(b0)
    +set w = shl(w, 8)
    +set w = bit_or(w, char_code(b1))
    +set w = shl(w, 8)
    +set w = bit_or(w, char_code(b2))
    +set w = shl(w, 8)
    +set w = bit_or(w, char_code(b3))
    +set w = u32_wrap(w)
    +set words = push(words, w)
    +set i = i + 4
  +return words

+fn sha256_compress (chunk:List<Int>, h0:Int, h1:Int, h2:Int, h3:Int, h4:Int, h5:Int, h6:Int, h7:Int)->List<Int>
  +let w:List<Int> = chunk
  +let t:Int = 16
  +while t < 64
    +let w_t_15:Int = get(w, t - 15)
    +let w_t_2:Int = get(w, t - 2)
    +let w_t_16:Int = get(w, t - 16)
    +let w_t_7:Int = get(w, t - 7)
    +let s0:Int = sha256_sigma_lower0(w_t_15)
    +let s1:Int = sha256_sigma_lower1(w_t_2)
    +let sum:Int = w_t_16 + s0 + w_t_7 + s1
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(sum)
    +set w = push(w, wrapped)
    +set t = t + 1
  +let a:Int = h0
  +let b:Int = h1
  +let c:Int = h2
  +let d:Int = h3
  +let e:Int = h4
  +let f:Int = h5
  +let g:Int = h6
  +let h:Int = h7
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 64
    +let s1_val:Int = sha256_sigma1(e)
    +let ch_val:Int = sha256_ch(e, f, g)
    +let k_val:Int = sha256_k(i)
    +let w_val:Int = get(w, i)
    +let temp1:Int = h + s1_val + ch_val + k_val + w_val
    +set temp1 = u32_wrap(temp1)
    +let s0_val:Int = sha256_sigma0(a)
    +let maj_val:Int = sha256_maj(a, b, c)
    +let temp2:Int = s0_val + maj_val
    +set temp2 = u32_wrap(temp2)
    +set h = g
    +set g = f
    +set f = e
    +let d_temp1:Int = d + temp1
    +set e = u32_wrap(d_temp1)
    +set d = c
    +set c = b
    +set b = a
    +let temp_sum:Int = temp1 + temp2
    +set a = u32_wrap(temp_sum)
    +set i = i + 1
  +let new_h0:Int = u32_wrap(h0 + a)
  +let new_h1:Int = u32_wrap(h1 + b)
  +let new_h2:Int = u32_wrap(h2 + c)
  +let new_h3:Int = u32_wrap(h3 + d)
  +let new_h4:Int = u32_wrap(h4 + e)
  +let new_h5:Int = u32_wrap(h5 + f)
  +let new_h6:Int = u32_wrap(h6 + g)
  +let new_h7:Int = u32_wrap(h7 + h)
  +let result:List<Int> = list()
  +set result = push(result, new_h0)
  +set result = push(result, new_h1)
  +set result = push(result, new_h2)
  +set result = push(result, new_h3)
  +set result = push(result, new_h4)
  +set result = push(result, new_h5)
  +set result = push(result, new_h6)
  +set result = push(result, new_h7)
  +return result

+fn sha256 (msg:String)->String
  +let h0:Int = 1779033703
  +let h1:Int = 3144134277
  +let h2:Int = 1013904242
  +let h3:Int = 2773480762
  +let h4:Int = 1359893119
  +let h5:Int = 2600822924
  +let h6:Int = 528734635
  +let h7:Int = 1541459225
  +let padded:List<String> = sha256_pad(msg)
  +let words:List<Int> = bytes_to_words(padded)
  +let num_words:Int = words.len
  +let chunk_idx:Int = 0
  +while chunk_idx < num_words
    +let chunk:List<Int> = list()
    +let j:Int = 0
    +while j < 16
      +let word:Int = get(words, chunk_idx + j)
      +set chunk = push(chunk, word)
      +set j = j + 1
    +let hash_vals:List<Int> = sha256_compress(chunk, h0, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, h7)
    +set h0 = get(hash_vals, 0)
    +set h1 = get(hash_vals, 1)
    +set h2 = get(hash_vals, 2)
    +set h3 = get(hash_vals, 3)
    +set h4 = get(hash_vals, 4)
    +set h5 = get(hash_vals, 5)
    +set h6 = get(hash_vals, 6)
    +set h7 = get(hash_vals, 7)
    +set chunk_idx = chunk_idx + 16
  +let hex0:String = to_hex(h0)
  +let hex1:String = to_hex(h1)
  +let hex2:String = to_hex(h2)
  +let hex3:String = to_hex(h3)
  +let hex4:String = to_hex(h4)
  +let hex5:String = to_hex(h5)
  +let hex6:String = to_hex(h6)
  +let hex7:String = to_hex(h7)
  +let result:String = concat(hex0, hex1)
  +set result = concat(result, hex2)
  +set result = concat(result, hex3)
  +set result = concat(result, hex4)
